query_normalized: multi-property trade-offs in alloy design using public compositional data materials science
rationale: The paper focuses on dynamic multi-objective optimization algorithms using mathematical benchmarks, lacking any application to materials science, alloy design, or public compositional data, which renders it off-domain for a review specifically targeting data-driven alloy design trade-offs.
